heading: Omitted
label: 61h, 61h–1 Omitted
notes: CodificationSection 61h, , , ; , , ; , , , set forth maximum annual rate of compensation for Assistant Secretaries for Senate Majority and Minority. , , , abolished such positions, effective , and authorized Secretaries concerned to appoint and fix compensation of such employees as they deem appropriate. L. 89–9079 Stat. 266Aug. 21, 1959Aug. 10, 1961July 27, 1965Section 61h–1, , , ; , , ; , , , set a maximum annual rate of compensation of $38,000 for administrative assistants in Offices of Senate Majority and Minority Leaders. Positions established by Legislative Branch Appropriation Act, 1970, for Offices of Senate Majority and Minority Leaders, which Act, , , , formerly classified to this section, authorized respective leaders to appoint an administrative assistant, were abolished, see title I of , , set out below. Abolition of Positions in Offices of Senate Majority and Minority Leaders, , , provided in part: The positions referred to were enumerated in , , , classified to former , which authorized the respective leaders to appoint an administrative assistant, a legislative assistant, an executive secretary, and a clerical assistant in lieu of the positions authorized prior thereto by Senate Resolution 158, agreed to , , approved , and Senate Resolution 240, agreed to .
